ApplyForEip.desc: Apply for an Elastic IP address
ApplyForEip.ipVersion: EIP IP version, either ipv4 or ipv6, defaults to ipv4.
ApplyForEip.routeType: EIP line type, either Standard BGP (BGP) or Enhanced BGP (BGP_S), defaults to Standard BGP.
ApplyForEip.bandwidthInMbps: Public network bandwidth in Mbps. For prepaid and postpaid EIPs billed by bandwidth, Standard BGP must be an integer between 1 and 500, Enhanced BGP between 100 and 5000 (representing the bandwidth cap); for postpaid EIPs billed by traffic, Standard BGP must be an integer between 1 and 200 (representing the allowed peak bandwidth).
ApplyForEip.billing.billingMethod: Billing method: ByTraffic, ByBandwidth, ByPeak95 (shared bandwidth postpaid only), or ByNetrafficMax (shared bandwidth postpaid only).
ApplyForEip.billing.reservation: Reservation details; not required for postpaid, mandatory for prepaid.
ApplyForEip.name: 1 to 65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, and -\_/. characters. If omitted, a name will be auto-generated.
ApplyForEip.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to associate with the new EIP.
ApplyForEip.tags.tagKey: Tag key; may contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -_ /. special characters, length 1–65.
ApplyForEip.tags.tagValue: Tag value; may contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -_ /. special characters, length 0–65.
ApplyForEip.resourceGroupId: ID of the resource group to bind to the EIP upon creation.
ApplyForEip.autoRenewTimeUnit: Time unit for auto-renewal when creating an EIP; accepted values are month or year (default: month).
ApplyForEip.autoRenewTime: Auto-renewal duration when creating an EIP; valid range depends on autoRenewTimeUnit: 1–9 for month, 1–3 for year.
ApplyForEip.deleteProtect: Whether to enable deletion protection. Defaults to false, meaning deletion is allowed.
